title: Extend 007 loading animation duration on initial page load

requirements.summary: Increase the duration of the Bond-style gun barrel (007) loading animation shown on the InitialLoadingScreen so that it remains visible for a noticeably longer period when the page first loads.
acceptanceCriteria: The gun barrel / 007 animation on InitialLoadingScreen plays for a longer duration before transitioning to the game.
The extended animation feels intentional and cinematic rather than a freeze or hang.
The rest of the loading sequence (progress bar, stage labels) still completes normally after the animation.

file_operations.description: Extend the duration of the gun barrel animation by increasing the animation timing or adding a delay before the component signals completion. Ensure the animation plays through its full cycle and holds for a cinematic pause before transitioning. Verify that progress bar and stage labels still update correctly and that the extended duration does not block the rest of the initialization sequence.
